author: jsign
content: The idea of sharing this is mainly that any EL team with guest program can also use the R2 bucket to run their guest programs in any shape/form they want too to test "real blocks" stuff.

author: jsign
content: All this is pretty new so might be a bit unstable sometimes, but for now should be good to go and use. Please ping here if something feels odd. If the underlying devnet is unstable, then obviously might impact this "service".

author: jsign
content: Ofc next steps is not only running the Python specs on these glamsterdam blocks but any other guest program in emulation mode or even in EF proving cluster -- but taking things in the right step order. But you don't have to wait for that and can simply use the dataset in any way you want.

author: omerfirmak
content: this is perfect! something I have been meaning to see if it was possible but never had the time.

author: omerfirmak
content: I will repurpose the CI script for zevm if you dont mind:)

author: jsign
content: Sure! Feel free to re-use anything that you want.
